name: Fast Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and garlic in olive oil until tender.
2. Add tomatoes to the pan and cook for a minute.
3. Stir in beans, water, and brown rice.
4. Season with herbs and spices of your choice.
5. Cook until the rice is tender and all liquid has been absorbed.
6. Serve with tossed salad.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
